title: Adventure #1
rules: Rules will be shown when needed directly inside the puzzle grid

middle.text: Welcome adventurer! Color the path to continue!

top.text: Complete this Nurikabe with the path color to advance!
Each island contains exactly one clue.

middle.text: The number of squares in islands is equal to the clue value.

bottom.text: A star (*) clue means any number

top.text: All islands are orthogonally isolated from each other.

middle.text: There are no shaded (path) areas of 2x2 or larger.

bottom.text: When completed, all shaded cells form a continuous path.
You must find another way in

top.text: You will need a flashlight to see in this dark area
Watch out! Do not
any gargoyles!

bottom.text: Does this fish look like a certain number?

top.text: You found a fish! Maybe someone would want it
You found a flashlight!
To be continued in Adventure #2...
Credit: vanillaice

bottom.text: "Here's my scuba gear, I won't be needed it for now"

middle.text: You will need scuba gear to dive into the lake
Find your way in this Lohkous puzzle to get into the valley

top.text: Almost finished!
"Hey buddy! I can't find any fishes

middle.text: in this lake, go find me one elsewhere.

bottom.text: I'll prepare a bucket for it."

top.text: Complete this LITS Pentominoes puzzle to advance
Divide the grid into 2 regions (safe path and reef)

middle.text: Each region can only have lenghts of runs of consecutive cells

bottom.text: of 1 or 3 within its region, vertically and horizontally
Shade (path) exactly four connected cells in each

top.text: Rules:
Lenghts may be repeated, but each given length must be
region to form an L, I, T, or S tetromino so that the

bottom.text: 1. All shaded cells are connected with each other

top.text: 2. No 2x2 group of cells can be shaded

middle.text: 3. No LITS touching can have the same shape

top.text: Another LITS puzzle!
